findings.message: New data-store write path (delete_items_by_prefix) has no metric or span instrumentation. This write operation is invisible to observability (no latency metric, no row-count metric, no tracing span). The function performs database mutations (session.delete + session.commit) without any observability instrumentation.
findings.suggestion: Add instrumentation around the delete operation: wrap with a span (if tracing is enabled), record a metric for the number of rows deleted, and/or record latency of the database operation. Consider adding a metric like 'db_rows_deleted_total' and/or 'db_delete_latency_ms' to make this operation observable.
